meta.title: Sleep Animal Quiz | Sleep Timeline Builder - DopaBrain
meta.description: Build your 24-hour sleep timeline and discover your chronotype animal. Are you a Bear, Lion, Wolf, or Dolphin?

intro.desc: Place your daily activities on a 24-hour circular timeline and discover your sleep chronotype animal!
intro.disclaimer: This quiz is for entertainment purposes only and is not a medical diagnosis.

timeline.title: My 24-Hour Timeline
timeline.subtitle: Select an activity and tap hours on the clock to place it

results.percentage: About {pct}% of people share this type

bear.name: Bear
bear.description: You follow the solar cycle naturally. With a steady and consistent rhythm, you're most productive mid-morning. Social, reliable, and a great team player.
sleepTips: Go to bed and wake up at the same time daily
Reduce screen time 2 hours before bed

lion.name: Lion
lion.description: You're the king of mornings! Bursting with energy from dawn, you hit peak productivity before noon. Goal-oriented and optimistic, you're a natural leader.

wolf.name: Wolf
wolf.description: You're a creative night owl who comes alive after sunset! Your energy and creativity peak in the evening. You think outside the box and march to your own beat.
sleepTips: Get bright light exposure in the morning
Try to be in bed by midnight
Take a light walk after dinner
Cold shower in the morning to wake up

dolphin.name: Dolphin
dolphin.description: You're a light sleeper with a brilliant mind. Perfectionist by nature, your brain is always buzzing. Your sleep may be irregular, but when you lock in, you produce extraordinary results.
sleepTips: Write a worry journal before bed

share.title: Share
share.twitterText: My sleep animal is {animal}{emoji}! Only {pct}% of people are this type 🌙
